creator: cristianorolim@outlook.com
text:
I had been the maintainer of the previous versions of Rsyslog (3,4,5) and now I can maintain the current port updated more quickly again.

I also have suggested several patches to the creator of Rsyslog in order to make it more "BSD portable".

So I am requesting the maintainership of the following ports:

sysutils/rsyslog7
sysutils/rsyslog7-devel
